creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
Created attachment 225392
core.txt.0

It occured when I wanted to play an mp4 file with mpv.
I can play most files with mpv, but some files make core dump.
I can play all files with mpv on 14.0-CURRENT main-n246500-d1cb8d11b0c.

% cat /var/crash/info.last

  Dump Status: good
